title: Outrage over Israeli soldier's vandalism of Jesus statue in Lebanon
summary_full: The Israeli military says it views with "great severity" the actions of the soldier, as the US ambassador demands "swift" consequences.
summary_public: The Israeli military says it views with "great severity" the actions of the soldier, as the US ambassador demands "swift" consequences.
